qa_pairs.question: Which rooms have exactly 2 beds?

qa_pairs.question: Which rooms have a maximum occupancy of at least 4 and are reserved by parties with at most 4 adults?

SELECT rooms.roomid FROM rooms
JOIN reservations ON rooms.roomid = reservations.room
WHERE rooms.maxoccupancy >= 4 AND reservations.adults <= 4
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which rooms entities with maxoccupancy at least '4', having at least one related reservations record (linked on rooms.roomid = reservations.room) with adults at most '4'?
